name: @aristotle/sigstore-rekor
description: Sigstore Rekor transparency-log client for AristotleOS. Implements the TimestampAuthority interface from @aristotle/gel-timestamp by posting hashedrekord entries to a Rekor server (default: the public Sigstore Rekor at https://rekor.sigstore.dev) and capturing the returned logIndex + UUID + signed entry timestamp in the anchor. Sigstore-flavored sibling of @aristotle/gel-timestamp-rfc3161.
